title: DMFeedbackResult
description: Output of /overture:boss. Stakeholder review with concerns, severity, fix suggestions. Ported from webapp's DMFeedbackResult + unified ReviewFeedback (src/stores/types.ts:849, 870).

mbti_type.description: MBTI code (ISTJ, INTJ, etc.) from boss-types.yaml. Present when this feedback came from a configured MBTI boss.

first_reaction.description: One-line first impression in the boss's voice. NO report-speak.

good_parts.description: 2-3 specific strengths. Must cite what section/point.

text.description: The concern — must point to WHERE (section/line).

severity.description: critical = blocker; important = should fix before ship; minor = nice-to-have.

fix_suggestion.description: Actionable direction. 'Here's how to fix it' — concern without fix is forbidden.

applied.description: User's decision on whether to apply this fix. critical defaults to true.

approval_condition.description: 'If you fix X, this is ready.' One specific sentence.

mode.description: quick = hallway conversation (~150 words); deep = team meeting.

would_ask.description: Deep mode only. Questions the boss would ask in a meeting.

failure_scenario.description: Deep mode only. Concrete scenario where this plan fails (2-3 sentences).

untested_assumptions.description: Deep mode only. What the document takes for granted that might not be true.
